subject: SK Hynix 美国 IPO
object: 265 亿美元，创史上最大外国公司上市纪录
source_quote: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs

subject: SK Hynix 美国 IPO
object: 265 亿美元，创史上最大外国公司上市纪录
source_quote: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. SK Hynix, a South Korean memory chip giant, said Friday it has raised $26.5 billion (KRW 40 trillion) in its U.S. market debut.

subject: SK Hynix 美国 IPO
object: 265 亿美元，创史上最大外国公司上市纪录
source_quote: 10:17 AM PDT · July 10, 2026

subject: SK Hynix 美国 IPO
object: 265 亿美元，创史上最大外国公司上市纪录
source_quote: SK Hynix sold 177.9 million American depositary shares (ADRs) at $149 each, structured so U.S. investors can buy in at roughly a tenth of what a full share costs in Seoul. This deal, the largest-ever U.S. debut by a non-American company, topped Alibaba’s $25 billion IPO in 2014.

subject: 苹果
object: OpenAI窃取商业机密以开发人工智能硬件
source_quote: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI today, accusing the company of trade secret theft. Specifically, Apple alleges that its former employees have stolen trade secrets “for the benefit of OpenAI.”

subject: 苹果
object: OpenAI窃取商业机密以开发人工智能硬件
source_quote: “This case is about Apple’s former employees stealing Apple’s trade secrets for the benefit of OpenAI. Apple brings this suit to put a stop to it,” the lawsuit says.

subject: 美联储
object: AI投资人Marc Andreessen加入工作组，研究AI对经济影响
source_quote: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh has appointed venture capitalist Marc Andreessen to advise the Federal Reserve on AI's economic impact. Warsh views AI as a "significant disinflationary force," but Andreessen's firm Andreessen Horowitz is heavily invested in AI companies, raising conflict-of-interest questions.

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI 窃取商业机密
source_quote: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI 窃取商业机密
source_quote: Apple filed a lawsuit Friday against OpenAI over allegations of trade secret theft and breach of contract.

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI 窃取商业机密
source_quote: The lawsuit, which was filed in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California, accuses Tan of using Apple’s confidential project code names during OpenAI’s recruiting process, asking job candidates to bring in Apple hardware components to their interviews, coaching departing Apple employees on how to evade the company’s security procedures, and asking for details about the company’s unannounced products.

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI 窃取商业机密
source_quote: Liu is also accused in the lawsuit of sharing Apple’s confidential information with other Apple employees applying for jobs at OpenAI, advising at least one of them on what to study before their interview.

subject: OXMIQ Labs Inc.
object: $35 million Series A financing
source_quote: OXMIQ Labs Inc. , a unified GPU and AI architecture company founded by Raja Koduri, has closed its $35 million Series A financing, bringing the company’s total capital raised to $60 million.

subject: Microsoft
object: Microsoft Marketplace
source_quote: Microsoft launched a single, unified Microsoft Marketplace that brings together Azure Marketplace and AppSource so customers can find, try, buy, and deploy cloud solutions and AI apps & agents in one place.

subject: Microsoft Marketplace
object: AI apps & agents catalog
source_quote: 3,000+ AI apps & agents are newly available and can be provisioned rapidly inside your Microsoft estate (including via Model Context Protocol).

subject: Canva
object: Canva AI 2.0, recasting its platform as an agentic system for work - SiliconANGLE
source_quote: Canva unveils Canva AI 2.0, recasting its platform as an agentic system for work

subject: Canva
object: Canva AI 2.0, recasting its platform as an agentic system for work - SiliconANGLE
source_quote: Visual communication platform provider Canva Pty Ltd. today unveiled Canva AI 2.0, an overhaul of its platform that offers a conversational, agentic system aimed at becoming the place where teams start and end their workday.

subject: Canva
object: Canva AI 2.0, recasting its platform as an agentic system for work - SiliconANGLE
source_quote: The release, announced at the company’s Canva Create event in Los Angeles, is being pitched as Canva’s biggest shift since its 2013 launch, when it moved design from desktop software into the browser.

subject: Canva
object: Canva AI 2.0, recasting its platform as an agentic system for work - SiliconANGLE
source_quote: Alongside the core platform advancements, Canva also introduced a set of workflow features designed to pull outside work into the editor. They include connectors that link Canva to Slack, Notion, Zoom, Gmail, Google Drive and Google Calendar to allow the assistant to draw on emails, transcripts and calendar entries to generate briefing documents, sales pitches and newsletters. A new scheduling feature runs tasks in the background on a set cadence and web research pulls structured, editable information into designs on demand.

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
source_quote: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
source_quote: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that former employees that now work for the AI company have stolen Apple’s trade secrets “for the benefit of OpenAI.”

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
source_quote: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup’s hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered “a pattern of theft of Apple’s trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple.” In addition to OpenAI, the lawsuit also names IO Products — Jony Ive’s hardware startup, which OpenAI bought in 2025 — along with two specific employees, Tang Tan (OpenAI’s chief hardware officer) and Chang Liu (who joined OpenAI from Apple in January).

subject: Apple
object: OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
source_quote: OpenAI’s first hardware product is expected to arrive next year. In the lawsuit, Apple casts doubt on OpenAI’s ability to ship — at least without relying on Apple’s work. “OpenAI’s nascent hardware business now rests on the shakiest of foundations,” the lawsuit says, “rotten to its core by its illegal reliance on misappropriated trade secrets.”

subject: Sunrun
object: distributed AI compute pilot program
source_quote: Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new “distributed AI compute” program that will “place numerous compute nodes in homes equipped with Sunrun solar and battery storage systems.”

subject: 腾讯洽谈
object: Manus 多数股权，此前北京迫使 Meta 放弃 20 亿美元收购
source_quote: Tencent is in talks to buy a majority stake in AI agent startup Manus at the same $2 billion valuation, according to the Financial Times, after Beijing blocked Meta's acquisition. Tencent sees overlap with its own agent plans, including for WeChat. U.S. firm Benchmark is not expected to take part.

object: OpenAI，指控其挖角前员工窃取未发布产品及供应链资料
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 11 日消息，据彭博社报道，苹果已于当地时间周五在美国加州北区联邦法院起诉 OpenAI， 指控该公司数名员工窃取未发布产品 、 零部件和供应商关系等高级商业机密 。

subject: 加速进化
object: Booster T2 具身开发旗舰平台：搭载英伟达 Thor 芯片，2070TFLOPS 算力
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 10 日消息，加速进化今日发布了具身开发旗舰平台 Booster T2，专业版现已开售，具体价格暂未公开（需在官网填写采购信息）。

subject: 加速进化
object: Booster T2 具身开发旗舰平台：搭载英伟达 Thor 芯片，2070TFLOPS 算力
source_quote: 加速进化 Booster T2 专业版标配 英伟达 Thor 芯片 ，算力达 2070TFLOPS，搭配 14 核 CPU（最高 2.6GHz）和 128GB 256bit LPDDR5X 内存，端侧多模态推理延迟低至 100ms。

subject: OpenAI
object: Atlas browser
source_quote: OpenAI is killing its AI browser Atlas less than eight months after launch.

subject: OpenAI
object: ChatGPT Chrome extension
source_quote: Its features are moving into ChatGPT's updated Chrome extension, which will let users run ChatGPT directly in Chrome's sidebar.

subject: 路透社
object: Meta AI图像检测工具
source_quote: 路透社的测试结果显示， 常见的图片修改操作就可能削弱检测能力 。

subject: 路透社
object: Meta AI图像检测工具
source_quote: 路透社使用 Muse Image 生成了 40 张图片。检测工具成功识别了全部原图，但同一批图片被裁剪至原图约三分之一至二分之一大小后， 55% 的图片无法通过验证 。

subject: Meta
object: Content Seal隐形水印
source_quote: Meta 回应路透社测试结果时强调，检测工具 仍是预览版本 。Content Seal 的设计目标是在常见编辑后继续保留水印信号， 但图片一旦被大幅裁剪，信号仍可能丢失 。
